atten2.ptxt: Wear protective gloves. Sharp areas on the seat frame and adjuster may injure your hands.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE RECLINING POWER SEAT SWITCH KNOB

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, detach the reclining power seat switch knob.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SLIDE AND VERTICAL POWER SEAT SWITCH KNOB

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, detach the slide and vertical power seat switch knob.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT CUSHION SHIELD ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the 2 hooks.
Remove the 5 screws.
Disengage the claw and separate the front seat cushion shield assembly.
Disconnect the connector from the front power seat lumbar switch.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT INNER NO. 1 SEAT CUSHION SHIELD

s2.ptxt: Remove the screw.
Detach the 2 claws and remove the front inner No. 1 seat cushion shield.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT LUMBAR POWER SEAT SWITCH

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws and front lumbar power seat switch.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT INNER BELT ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: for Driver seat:

s3.ptxt: Disconnect the connectors and disengage the 4 clamps.

s2.ptxt: for Passenger seat:

s3.ptxt: Disconnect the connector and disengage the 3 clamps.

s2.ptxt: Remove the nut and front seat inner belt assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT INNER SEAT CUSHION SHIELD

s2.ptxt: Remove the screw.
Using a clip remover, detach the clip.
Using a screwdriver, detach the claw and remove the front inner seat cushion shield.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER SEAT TRACK SPACER

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws and lower seat track spacer.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT POWER SEAT SWITCH

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws.
Disconnect the connector and remove the front power seat switch.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEPARATE TYPE SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the 2 clamps.
Remove the 4 hooks.
Using a screwdriver, detach the hooks and remove the front separate type seat cushion assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEPARATE TYPE SEAT CUSHION COVER (for Except Sports Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 16 hog rings and front separate type seat cushion cover from the seat cushion pad.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEPARATE TYPE SEAT CUSHION COVER (for Sports Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 17 hog rings and front separate type seat cushion cover from the seat cushion pad.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT BACK BOARD SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws.
Disconnect the 14 clamps and front separate type seat back cover.
Pull the seat back board in the direction indicated by the arrow in the illustration to detach the 2 claws. Then, remove the seat back board.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT

s2.ptxt: Detach the 2 claws and remove the headrest support.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT
REMOVE FRONT SEPARATE TYPE SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 hog rings and 3 hooks.
Remove the nut and 2 seat back cover brackets.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEPARATE TYPE SEAT BACK COVER (for Except Sports Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 10 hog rings and front separate type seat back cover from the seat back pad.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEPARATE TYPE SEAT BACK COVER (for Sports Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 14 hog rings and front separate type seat back cover from the seat back pad.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LUMBAR SUPPORT ADJUSTER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the connector.
Remove the 2 screws and lumbar support adjuster assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE RECLINING ADJUSTER INSIDE COVER RH

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the harness.
Remove the 2 screws and reclining adjuster inside cover RH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE RECLINING ADJUSTER INSIDE COVER LH

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the harness.
Remove the 2 screws and reclining adjuster inside cover LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SEAT RECLINING ADJUSTER INSIDE COVER RH

s2.ptxt: Remove the screw.
Detach the claw and remove the seat reclining adjuster inside cover RH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SEAT RECLINING ADJUSTER INSIDE COVER LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the screw.
Detach the claw and remove the seat reclining adjuster inside cover LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT LOWER SEAT CUSHION SHIELD LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the screw and detach the hook of the front lower seat cushion shield LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT LOWER SEAT CUSHION SHIELD
REMOVE SEAT POSITION SENSOR (for Driver Side)

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the connector.
Using a "torx" socket wrench (T30), separate the "torx" screw and seat position sensor with the seat slide position sensor protector.
Remove the seat position sensor from the seat slide position sensor protector as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT WIRE
